en: I wish I could tell them how grateful they should be to you You were every bit as brave as I was
Harriet you're talking in the wrong direction
ko: 좋아 듣고 있으면 나랑 비슷해 태도가 좋아

en: Don't worry about Granny She's getting ready to give Cousin Maud a grilling
ko: 합체해서 하나의 끔찍한 롭 밀러가 되는 거야

en: Mainly I suspect about her maid
I think Lady Bagshaw sees her as more than just her maid Oh I'm sure she does And that's what Granny's afraid of
ko: 수술을 하고 싶긴 한데 서로 없이 어떻게 될지 모르겠어

en: I might as well admit I like her Good
Don't let them put you off
Tom you're looking pleased with yourself He was just praising Lady Bagshaw's maid
ko: 이래서 좋아하는 거구나 왜 마누라가 나랑 결혼했는지 알겠어

en: How did she contrive to make your acquaintance She didn't contrive anything We met by chance
What simpletons men are This is good I thought something else was planned But it
is excellent So a well done to old Corbet
This wasn't Monsieur Corbet Your Majesty Mrs Patmore cooked it
